title: (Japanese Speaking) Executive Assistant / Translator to MD | Up to 5K
description:
[Job ID: 1461532]

Responsibilities

  • Serve as the primary liaison between the Managing Director and internal/external stakeholders.
  • Provide verbal and written translation between English and Japanese during meetings, presentations, and business discussions.
  • Interpret instructions and communications between the Managing Director and non‑Japanese‑speaking staff or partners.
  • Translate internal and external documents, presentations, and media materials between English and Japanese.
  • Coordinate and support business meetings by providing real‑time interpretation.
  • Draft and respond to emails in English and Japanese, including communication with headquarters in Japan.
  • Arrange travel itineraries and logistics for the Managing Director and visiting delegates.
  • Handle local and overseas staff claims.
  • Perform administrative duties assigned by the Managing Director.

Requirements

  • Excellent command of English and proficiency in Japanese (JLPT N2) for liaising with Japanese‑speaking clients and stakeholders.
  • Minimum 2 years of translation or interpretation experience.
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office and productivity platforms such as SharePoint.
  • Proactive, adaptable, and able to work effectively under pressure.
  • Able to travel for business at short notice.
  • Class 3 driving licence is an added advantage.
  • Willingness to perform administrative tasks, including travel arrangements and logistical coordination.

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified. However, rest assured that all applications will be updated to our resume bank for future opportunities.
